title: Bleppack
description: This is a modpack of some of my friends that we use on a private server. It is Vanilla+ Style with some just for fun additions that may or may not be Vanilla friendly.
body:
This is a modpack of some of my friends that we use on a private server. It is Vanilla+ Style with some just for fun additions that may or may not be Vanilla friendly.

It is maintained by me and some of my friends for our shared use. Feel free to change it up or add your own things.

The modpack is based on Exploring, automation with create and addons and just some non Vanilla Friendly additions for fun, that obviously don't have to be used ^^
